title: Slate Works
description: Slate Works is an addon for Hex Casting that adds in many new Spell Circle blocks
body:
# Slate Works!
### ~~uh yea, I sure hope they do~~
An addon for improving and adding to Spell Circles in many different ways
![A hand made banner made in minecraft. Spells out "SLATE WORKS" with different loci and slates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3DnSSjl3/images/59677fcb80d1a94170e8cce23074223dad6f9d55.png)
## Current Loci (Blocks for Spell Circles):
* Storage Vessels, a new way to store and interact with items through Spell Circles
* Patterned Assemblers, a way to craft items via Storage Vessels
* Ambit Extenders, can change the ambit of a Spell Circle while it is still running
* Wave Regulators, controls the speed of the Spell Circle's media wave
* Spell Imprinters, alters a pattern's meaning when inscribed into Slate (macros!)
* Muffling Slate, quiets down your noisy and annoying Spell Circles!
* Sentinel Caches, a tiny sentinel meant for Spell Circles that are forged from an amalgamation of minds
* Iotic Doors, which work as a basic small Akashic Library that only works with "basic" iotas
* Pocket Simulator, gives a Spell Circles 6 inventory slots it can pull from
* Redstone Agitator, control redstone from inside a Spell Circle with precise control
* Makes Akashic Records a locus, so you can read/write to them for free using a Spell Circle
* Gloopy Accelerator, for a small cost of Media, speeds up a Spell Circle greatly
* Restoration Mainframe, for when you just need to store a whole Spell Circle state
* Synthetic Dreamer, a Fake Player locus for using items and attacking entities in a Spell Circle

## Current Impeti:
* Librarian Impetus, listens to a local chat and starts casting based on the starting part of a message. Also has the Whispering Stone, which lets you use a Librarian Imptus from anywhere in the world

And there is so much more planned, and quite a bit more added currently

![All the blocks currently added in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3DnSSjl3/images/8c0d2f0046b9f81ecc633b397a32596ffd04f94e.png)
